paper_title: BasqueGLUE: A Natural Language Understanding Benchmark for Basque
evaluation_method: Nine-task NLU benchmark for Basque modeled after GLUE and SuperGLUE. Each subtask uses its own metric: BEC2016eu (sentiment) uses micro-average F1, BHTCv2 (topic classification) uses micro-average F1, WiCeu (word sense disambiguation) uses accuracy, VaxxStance (stance detection) uses macro-average F1 of FAVOR and AGAINST classes, QNLIeu (NLI) uses accuracy, EPEC-korref-Bin (coreference) uses accuracy. Results are reported individually per task, not averaged into a composite score.
metric: task-dependent (micro-F1, macro-F1, or accuracy per subtask)
